{{Quote|This is the Kolatill Council…all New Republic forces, please send assistance immediately. After imprisoning the Imperial governor we have been attacked by TIE bombers. Domaz, our capital, is in flames. Please send emergency medical assistance.|Distress call from Kolatill|<ref name="O" />}}
The '''Kolatill Council''', also known as the '''Council of Kolatill''', was the ruling body of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kolatill]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the Council was arrested by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Tetrum]] following his declaration of martial law on the world. [[8 ABY/Legends|Eight years later]], the populace overthrew Tetrum in response to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic's]] [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|liberation]] of the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]], which deposed the local Imperial [[Warlord/Legends|warlord]], [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]]. The Council was freed from [[Prison/Legends|prison]]; and they took up their old position, although their [[Time/Legends|time]] incarcerated had reduced their number to only three members, including Councilor [[Kause]].

After declaring allegiance to the New Republic, the Council and the population of Kolatill were forced to endure [[Bombing of Domaz|two]] [[Battle of Kolatill|assaults]] against their planet by [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]] loyal to Moff Sarne. The New Republic [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' responded to the Council's [[Distress signal/Legends|distress signal]] following the devastation of the capital [[City/Legends|city]], [[Domaz]], providing relief aid and assisting in fending off the second assault on the planet. The Council, grateful for the New Republic's efforts, publicly thanked the crew of the ''FarStar'', and provided them with information that allowed them to carry out their [[DarkStryder Campaign|mission]] to track down Moff Sarne.

==History==
[[File:Kolatill.jpg|right|thumb|Kolatill]]
The Kolatill Council, also referred to as the Council of Kolatill, was the governing body of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kolatill]] in the [[Kathol sector/Legends|Kathol sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. They controlled the world until [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], when the local [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]], [[Kentor Sarne]], appointed [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Tetrum]] to rule over Kolatill. On Sarne's orders, Tetrum instituted martial law; all of the local [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] manufacturers were required to provide combat [[Airspeeder/Legends|speeders]] for the Moff's [[Moff Sarne's forces|forces]]. The Council was arrested and [[Prisoner/Legends|imprisoned]].<ref name="O" />

In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], the population of Kolatill rose up against Tetrum and imprisoned him. Moff Sarne's regime had fallen, as the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] had [[Battle of Kal'Shebbol|taken]] his [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]] and forced him to retreat. The Council was freed from incarceration, but the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] in [[Prison/Legends|prison]] had reduced their number to only three. The populace requested that the remaining Council members retake their position, and they agreed, reforming the Council with Councilor [[Kause]] at its head. They promptly declared that Kolatill was pledging its allegiance to the New Republic.<ref name="O" />

Shortly after, the planet was [[Bombing of Domaz|assaulted]] by the [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] ''[[Kathol Protector]]'', which devastated the capital [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Domaz]]. The Council immediately issued a [[Distress signal/Legends|distress signal]], requesting aid from New Republic forces. The signal was received by the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'', which was about to set out on a [[DarkStryder Campaign|mission]] to track down Moff Sarne. The vessel, under the command of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Keleman Ciro]], sped to the planet and rendered aid to the population of Domaz. During the relief efforts, Councilor Kause personally escorted members of the ''FarStar'' delegation around the city, and requested a meeting with Captain Ciro in the capital. The Council planned to broadcast the meetings across the planet for morale-boosting purposes and to show that the situation was under control.<ref name="O" />

As Ciro was making his way to the surface for a meeting with the Council in a [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomatic]] [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], the ''Kathol Protector'' returned to initiate a [[Battle of Kolatill|second attack]] on the planet. During the fighting, Captain Ciro's shuttle was captured and taken aboard the ''Kathol Protector'', although the ''FarStar'', aided by the nascent [[Kolatill Defense Force]], managed to fend off the attack. In the aftermath of the battle, the Council held a memorial service to honor those lost in the recent upheavals and to publicly thank the ''FarStar'' crew for its efforts. They provided the crew with the coordinates for the planet [[Gandle Ott]], allowing the ''FarStar'' to continue its mission.<ref name="O" />

==Organization==
The Kolatill Council was comprised of several individuals who were responsible for the governing of Kolatill. In 8 ABY, after the bombing of Domaz, only three members of the Council remained, led by Councilor Kause.<ref name="O" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Kolatill Council was introduced in the [[Roleplaying game|RPG]] adventure ''[[Omens]]'', which was published in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]'' by [[West End Games]] in [[1995]].<ref name="O" />
